title: Mamata's Strongroom Vigil, TMC Protest & ‘Life-And-Death’ Warning: Inside Bengal’s High-Voltage EVM Drama
description: As the 48-hour countdown to the Assembly poll results begins, Mamata Banerjee’s midnight visit to a Kolkata strongroom has set the stage for a defiant standoff over EVM security. Here's a look at escalating political drama ahead of the final count.
